professional_summary: AI Generalist with hands-on experience in AI response evaluation and structured quality assessment workflows. Experienced in reviewing AI-generated outputs, assessing factual consistency, instruction adherence, relevance, and clarity. Familiar with human feedback processes used in AI model improvement pipelines. Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and ability to work independently in remote task-based environments.
core_ai_generalist_competencies: Critical Thinking in AI Output Review

responsibilities: Participated in AI-related evaluation tasks as an AI Generalist.
Reviewed and assessed AI-generated outputs according to project requirements.
Evaluated response quality based on accuracy, relevance, clarity, and instruction adherence.
Identified inconsistencies and potential quality issues in generated content.
Applied project guidelines to support the improvement of AI model performance.
Contributed to quality-focused workflows involving human evaluation and feedback.

description: Evaluated AI-generated responses using project-specific guidelines.
Assessed response quality, factual consistency, relevance, and instruction adherence.
Identified response weaknesses and quality issues requiring correction.
Applied critical thinking and structured evaluation methodologies.
Contributed human feedback to support AI model improvement processes.

Fact Verification Techniques for AI Outputs
